nasb.text: But many of those who had heard the message believed; and the number of the men came to be about five thousand.

esv.text: But many of those who had heard the word believed, and the number of the men came to about five thousand.

cnv.text: 然而有許多聽道的人信了，男人的數目，約有五千。

ccb.text: 但有许多听道的人信了，男人的数目约有五千人。

csbs.text: 然而听了这话语的人中，有许多人相信了；男人的数目约有五千。
